content: LinearSVC defaults penalty=l2 loss=squared_hinge dual=auto tol=1e-4 C=1.0 intercept_scaling=1 max_iter=1000. dual='auto': if n_samples<n_features AND optimizer supports loss/multi_class/penalty -> dual=True else False. intercept_scaling appends synthetic feature = intercept_scaling to X; intercept_=intercept_scaling*synthetic_weight (higher scaling => less reg on intercept). Solver liblinear coordinate descent (NOT SGD). LinearSVR defaults loss=epsilon_insensitive(per sklearn ctor) BUT roadmap/req pins squared_epsilon_insensitive as the Phase-10 default to track; epsilon=0.0 C=1.0 dual=auto tol=1e-4 intercept_scaling=1 max_iter=1000.
